div1.entryFree:
Fruitless, 1) barren, having no offspring: upon my head they placed a f. crown, Mcb. III, 1, 61.
2) empty, vain, idle: a dream and f. vision, Mids. III, 2, 371. f. pranks, Tw. IV, 1, 59.
3) averse to love, cold: despite of f. chastity, Ven. 751. chanting faint hymns to the cold f. moon, Mids. I, 1, 73.
